Full composition (as declared by the manufacturer/retailer): Parfum (fragrance composition), Alpha-Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Limonene, Alpha-Phellandrene, Carveol, Carvyl Acetate, 2-Acetonaphthone, Dimethylpyrazine, Dipropylene Glycol (carrier/diluent). Scent profile: a sweet, warm oriental floral-fruity blend of plum and peach with woody oud and amber facets over cypress and vanilla.
note: HIGH: exact composition list confirmed via the Sangam Ombre Plum retailer listing (Парфюм, альфа-токоферол, лимонен, Альфа-фелландрен, карвеол, карвилацетат, 2-ацетонафтон, диметилпиразин, дипропиленгликоль) — same documented 'Ombre' line base as Black Opium (minus valencene); scent notes (plum, peach, cypress, oud, amber, vanilla) corroborated in the listing and the product's own desc_ru. Translated to EU-safe INCI-style English with no medical claims.
